positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a stylized fox silhouette leaping over abstract celestial constellations and stylized mountains. The design should utilize a vibrant yet earthy color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, mustard yellow, and forest green, creating high contrast against a neutral background. The style should evoke modern linocut woodblock prints mixed with sophisticated, whimsical mid-century Scandinavian graphic design. Use clean lines, strong graphic shapes, and clear silhouettes. The composition must be centered and scalable for fabric printing, maintaining visual interest across different print areas. Studio lighting, vector illustration quality, art deco inspired pattern elements.
